Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Emperor (The Elder Empire: Sea)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — The Emperor has been dead for over five years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor is deceased.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — The Emperor is a Reader with overwhelming powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — The Emperor can levitate wagons or create doors in blank walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor lived for almost two millennia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — The Emperor is a man who uses objects that harbor his limitless Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Emperor used a parasite to achieve immortality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Emperor is believed to be resurrected or immortal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Emperor is a figure Naberius lived around in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Naberius has had long proximity to the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The position of Emperor is currently vacant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — The Emperor is described as the light and life of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The future Emperor is expected to board the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor died because he could not resist the Dead Mother when she began to awaken.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor was a powerful man who borrowed the power of the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — The Emperor has done many bad things in his time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Holding the Heart can make a case for the Emperor’s throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — The Emperor is described as being so removed from humanity that he might as well be Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The Emperor ordered Alsa Grayweather to be kept in Guild custody.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — The characters discuss the need for an Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — The Emperor spared Calder from execution.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — The Emperor used the Optasia to control amplification devices and use his Intent anywhere instantly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — The Emperor cannot grow living flesh at will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Calder is an Emperor who intends to sit on a throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor makes many decisions for the Guilds but does not care about people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The original Emperor is considered the father of all.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — The Emperor sends Navigators with personal instructions and the Imperial Seal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — The Emperor is the only one to have seen Ach’magut directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Calder is the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Calder is destined to be the Emperor one day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Emperor is an exception to the rule that Readers should not rule over the populace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor is a figure of authority that people are encouraged to protect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor built a network of relays consisting of statues that look like him all around the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor sealed the Optasia away from himself and allegedly employed watchers to ensure he never used it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor specified the construction of the carriage Calder is riding in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor has invested thousands of goldmarks into The Testament's construction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor's authority is invoked by the Imperial Steward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — The Emperor is issuing orders to search for suspicious vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — The Emperor is a figurehead with absolute power to indulge his whims.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — The Emperor has no official duties.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Emperor has powers that can be referenced by Imperial relics.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Emperor protected everyone from the Elders and has lived for over two thousand years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Emperor had a desire for safe, peaceful sleep that invested his bed with Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor's crown was once made of bronze.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor's trademark attire includes a wide-brimmed hat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Regents trust in the power of the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Calder has felt the force of will projected by the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — The Emperor has a crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Emperor has a ghost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Emperor invested the armor to protect and preserve the life of the wearer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Capital swelled with people for the funeral of the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — The Emperor's images are painted on walls in the Capital to protect spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Defying the Emperor is considered defying the Empire, civilization, and humanity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor has Read Elders before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor claims to be the first Reader and asserts that the Guild of Magisters has no authority over his teachings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor crafts a ghost by layering his memories into his belongings and molding his Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Emperor possesses boundless resolve and an iron will forged in war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor gave up his life rather than losing a battle to the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Emperor left a clear, comprehensive Intent in the Optasia to create an echo of his personality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Emperor's personality echo was intended to bolster his will against Nakothi's corruption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Emperor was once known by the name Sadesthenes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Emperor's persona as Sadesthenes was the self-educated son of a wine merchant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Emperor and Calder woke in the same body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Emperor's echo is a force to be reckoned with.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
